description_long: This limousine features a sleek, elongated black body with a low profile and sharply defined contours, giving it a futuristic and armored appearance. The front end is characterized by a wide, flat hood with prominent vent details and subtle yellow headlights. Along the sides, the vehicle displays smooth, uninterrupted panels with stylized wheel covers and a series of metallic exhaust or intake vents. The rear is distinguished by dramatic, fin-like extensions and a recessed back section, enhancing its aerodynamic and aggressive look. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, with no visible door handles or trim. The overall design suggests a high-performance, luxury vehicle with a focus on style and presence.
description: A sleek, black, futuristic limousine with sharp contours, dramatic rear fins, and metallic vent details, exuding luxury and high performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, flat hood with vent details and yellow headlights, emphasizing the vehicle's low, aggressive stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, smooth panels, stylized wheel covers, and metallic side vents.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals dramatic fin-like extensions and a recessed back, with the vehicle's aerodynamic shape most prominent.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same elongated profile, smooth surfaces, and metallic vent features.
